title: OHDSI Characterization
description: Federated cohort characterization using the OHDSI Characterization package. Builds a cohort from UCDM data and runs baseline/incidence analyses against a local OMOP CDM.

dsn.description: SQLAlchemy DSN for the OMOP CDM database (PostgreSQL or SQLite).

cdm_schema.description: Database schema that contains the OMOP CDM tables (e.g. public, omop, dbo).

work_schema.description: Schema where the temporary cohort table will be created. Must be writable by the DB user. Defaults to cdm_schema.

target_ids.description: Comma-separated cohort_definition_id values to use as target cohorts (must match the cohort data returned by the UCDM query).

outcome_ids.description: Comma-separated cohort_definition_id values to use as outcome cohorts. Leave blank to run baseline characterization only.

database_id.description: Short identifier for this database/site. Appears in result CSV files.

min_cell_count.description: Minimum patient count for a cell to be reported (0 = no suppression).

threads.description: Number of parallel threads for the analysis.
